fieldValues.value: ext:discovery containerId filter uses RFC-009 I-66 three-condition membership

A containerId filter predicate MUST use the three-condition membership definition of RFC-009 I-66: (1) instanceId in Container.rootInstanceIds[], OR (2) instanceId in Container.memberInstanceIds[], OR (3) reachable via transitive contains Relation traversal from any rootInstanceIds[] entry. The instance file and relations file are authoritative; an implementation MAY use instanceIndex as a performance cache but MUST treat instance file and relations file as authoritative when they conflict with the cache.
